title: Customer Service Officer
description:
Job Summary

The Customer Service Officer manages customer communications, supports enrolment and onboarding, coordinates class schedules and attendance, handles billing, and ensures smooth daily operations at Ace Swim Club. This role acts as a key liaison between customers, coaches, and internal teams.

Responsibilities

  • Serve as the primary contact for new and existing customers across WhatsApp, email, phone, and other channels to provide accurate programme, schedule, fee, billing, and application information
  • Respond promptly and professionally to customer feedback and resolve issues to maintain customer satisfaction
  • Follow up on customer enquiries to support enrolment and guide customers through registration, payment, and onboarding processes
  • Place swimmers accurately into classes based on programme requirements and availability
  • Manage and update class schedules and swimmer rosters to ensure accurate and current information
  • Coordinate class changes, transfers, and make-up sessions to accommodate customer needs
  • Consolidate and maintain attendance records, ensuring alignment with class schedules and billing data
  • Prepare basic operational and attendance reports to support management decisions
  • Handle administrative paperwork related to enrolment and class management efficiently
  • Liaise with coaches to communicate class schedules, attendance updates, and operational matters
  • Support coordination between coaches and management to ensure smooth daily operations
  • Assist with operational planning and day-to-day coordination tasks as required

Required competencies and certifications

  • Strong written and verbal communication skills to interact effectively with customers and internal teams
  • Good organisational and time-management skills to manage schedules, records, and administrative tasks
  • Proficiency in digital tools including messaging platforms, spreadsheets, and online forms to support communication and data management
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team environment
  • Willingness to work on-site on selected weekdays and weekends as part of a hybrid working arrangement

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Diploma or equivalent qualification
  • At least 1 year of experience in customer service, administration, operations, or a related field

Other Information

  • Work Schedule & Location: Hybrid working arrangement with on-site(Woodlands) work required on Tuesday, Thursday, Saturday, and Sunday
  • Training will be provided
  • Role may involve occasional schedule adjustments based on operational needs

postedCompany.name: AQUATIC CENTRE OF EXCELLENCE PTE LTD
